compiled_state.title: [review workflow]: long-running sessions -> generic sub-agents dispatched instead of named dso:code-reviewer-* agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Actual Behavior
During long-running sessions (or after context compaction), the review workflow dispatches generic sub-agents (general-purpose) for code review instead of the designated named agents (dso:code-reviewer-light, dso:code-reviewer-standard, dso:code-reviewer-deep-*). This violates the named-agent requirement in CLAUDE.md rule 8 and produces reviews that bypass the tiered review quality protocol.

## Expected Behavior
All code reviews must use the named dso:code-reviewer-* agents as selected by the classifier (light for score 0-2, standard for 3-6, deep for 7+). Generic agents are explicitly prohibited per CLAUDE.md rule 8.

## Evidence
- debug-everything sessions on 2026-04-18: reviewer dispatched as general-purpose with instructions to write reviewer-findings.json (correct structure but wrong dispatch mechanism)
- This pattern recurs across multiple sessions and host projects
- The reviewer-findings.json ends up written to wrong paths (plugin cache vs artifacts dir) when the generic agent cannot resolve the shim correctly

## Root Cause Hypothesis
1. After context compaction, the CLAUDE.md rule about named agents is not salient enough to prevent the orchestrator from defaulting to general-purpose
2. The review workflow instructions (REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md) may not repeat the prohibition clearly enough at the point of sub-agent dispatch
3. Long sessions may cause the orchestrator to rationalize using generic agents for efficiency

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run /dso:debug-everything or /dso:sprint for multiple hours
2. Allow context compaction to occur
3. Observe that subsequent /dso:review dispatches use general-purpose instead of dso:code-reviewer-standard

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. Dual-signal: ticket references named vs generic agent dispatch in review workflow (behavioral signal) + affected files are in skills/ (REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md and/or agents/). CLI_user tag present — Gate 1a skipped.
comments.author: Test
